mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term earnings support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the sales trend is rising.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS snapshot was 732010.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above 4% tightens discount-rate conditions and raises the hurdle rate for equities, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after the crossing.
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot was 4.22 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS crossings above 4.0% are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances or the mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration while policy rates are already high forces markets to price tighter-for-longer policy, compressing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL snapshot was 323.364 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-inflation and high-rate condition produces nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests or has no lower return than either proxy alone.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals weakening income growth and recession risk, reducing expected corporate earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE snapshot was 4.3 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE increases greater than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in industrial production signals improving goods-sector output and operating leverage, supporting earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO snapshot was 103.9203 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO growth has a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 with 60-day S&P 500 returns or if average forward returns are not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening rate-sensitive demand and future construction softness, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST snapshot was 1307.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST drops more than 10% below its 12-month moving average and subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Falling retail sales combined with rising consumer prices signals real consumption stress, weakening revenue growth while inflation protects margins poorly, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS and CPIAUCSL snapshots were available as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint falling-sales and rising-prices condition does not produce lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than standalone RSAFS weakness in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth with unemployment contained signals a soft-landing labor backdrop that supports income and risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS snapshot was 159540 and latest UNRATE snapshot was 4.3 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-growth and low-unemployment condition is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in less than 52% of triggered instances or has negative average return.
